diagrams.title: Exit Status Code Spectrum
diagrams.description: Visual representation of exit status values and their meanings
elements: 1-255 range shown as increasing error severity
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exit code classification and when each is used

diagrams.title: $? Variable Lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Emphasizing immediate checking of exit status

diagrams.title: Signal to Exit Code Mapping
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how signals translate to exit codes

diagrams.title: Pipeline Exit Status Behavior
diagrams.description: Comparison of default vs pipefail behavior
elements: Default: returns status of Command3 only
With pipefail: returns status of rightmost failed command
All succeed: returns 0 in both cases
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to properly handle errors in pipelines
